Question: How will the sunrays here create shadow with light while coming through smalle dia holes ?

Option 1 says "Spread the light due to diffraction but reduce the luminescence, shadow will be less visible" — that matches what I know about diffraction through small holes. So the correct answer is 1.</think>

<answer>1</answer>
